---
title: "Interactive Graphs"
listing:
  contents:
    - graphs/**/index.qmd
  type: default
  sort: "title"
  fields: [title, description]
---
Explore NBA visualizations and tools built from really really unique NBA data.


```{r}
plot_player_shots('Normal Powell', opposing_team = 'Heat', target_team = 'Bulls', game_year = 2025, 401705482)
```
